mapper.select: select count(category_cd) from issue where category_cd='01ISSUECATE' and status_cd= '04ISSUESTAT' and prj_id=1001
select count(category_cd) from issue where category_cd='02ISSUECATE' and status_cd= '04ISSUESTAT' and prj_id=1001
select count(category_cd) from issue where category_cd='03ISSUECATE' and status_cd= '04ISSUESTAT' and prj_id=1001
select count(category_cd) from issue where category_cd='04ISSUECATE' and status_cd= '04ISSUESTAT' and prj_id=1001
